CreateInstanceBySpec.keepImageLogin: Whether to use the preset password from the image. Default: false. true: use the preset password in the image; false: do not use it. 1. If set to true, password and keypairId must be empty. 2. Only supported for custom or shared images.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bccCreateWithScript: Automation script to execute when creating a BCC instance
CreateInstanceBySpec.name: Instance name (optional). If not specified, a name is auto-generated as {instance-8-char-random-suffix-index}. If specified, it is used as a prefix in batch creation with a suffix appended as {name-index}. The index increments based on count (e.g., 000–100 for count=100). Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters -_ /.; must start with a letter; length 1–65.
CreateInstanceBySpec.cpuThreadConfig: Number of threads per physical core (vCPU), controlling whether hyper-threading is enabled. Valid values: 1, 2. Note: 1. Default value is 2. 2. Only supported on bare-metal instance types with Intel 7th gen or above, or AMD 3rd gen or above.
CreateInstanceBySpec.numaConfig: NUMA configuration for the CPU. Meaning varies by platform. 1. Intel: 0 disables NUMA, 1 enables NUMA. 2. AMD: controls NPS (Nodes Per Socket); valid values are 0, 1, 2, 4, auto, corresponding to NPS0, NPS1, NPS2, NPS4, and auto. Note: 1. Default is NUMA enabled (Intel) / NPS1 (AMD), i.e., value 1. 2. Only supported on bare-metal instance types with Intel 7th gen or above, or AMD 3rd gen or above.
CreateInstanceBySpec.hostname: Instance hostname (optional). If not specified, auto-generated as {instance-8-char-random-suffix-index}. If specified, used as a prefix in batch creation with suffix appended as {name-index}. Only supports lowercase letters, digits, and special characters - .; must start with a letter; consecutive special characters not allowed; cannot start or end with special characters; length 2–64.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoSeqSuffix: Whether to auto-generate sequential suffixes for name and hostname (optional). true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenHostnameDomain: Whether to auto-generate a hostname domain (optional). true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.adminPass: Administrator password for the instance. 8–32 characters, must contain at least three of: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, digits, special characters. Allowed special characters: ()`~!@#$%^&*-_+=\|{}[]:;'<>,.?/. Must be encrypted before transmission.
CreateInstanceBySpec.keypairId: ID of the key pair to bind to the instance being created
CreateInstanceBySpec.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame. Default: false. true: enable, false: disable. Note: only supported on instance types that support Jumbo Frame.
CreateInstanceBySpec.userData: UserData to pass to the instance if it meets the custom user data requirements. UserData is not encrypted during API transmission; avoid passing sensitive information (e.g., passwords, private keys) in plaintext. If necessary, encrypt and Base64-encode before passing, and decode within the instance accordingly.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deletionProtection: Instance release protection. Default: 0 (disabled). 1: enabled. When enabled, manual release of the instance is prohibited.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoRenewTimeUnit: Required if auto-renewal is enabled, otherwise leave empty. Billing cycle unit: "month" for monthly, "year" for yearly.
CreateInstanceBySpec.autoRenewTime: Required if auto-renewal is enabled, otherwise leave empty. Auto-renewal duration: 1–9 for monthly, 1–5 for yearly.
CreateInstanceBySpec.hosteyeType: Host security type, effective when isOpenHostEye is true. "enterprise": enable enterprise-grade host security; "open" or omitted: enable basic host security.
CreateInstanceBySpec.dataPartitionType: Data disk file system format. Valid values: xfs, ext4.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootPartitionType: System disk file system format. Valid values: xfs, ext4.
CreateInstanceBySpec.cdsAutoRenew: [Deprecated, CDS auto-renewal follows BCC setting] Whether to enable CDS auto-renewal. true: yes, false: no.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList: List of CDS disks to be created
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.storageType: CDS disk storage type. Options: SSD_Enhanced (enhanced SSD), cloud_hp1 (general SSD), hp1 (high-performance cloud disk), hdd (general HDD). Default: hp1.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.cdsSizeInGB: CDS disk capacity in GB. Must be a positive integer. Range: 0–5120 GB.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.cdsNum: Number of disks (when creating an instance)
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.cdsExtraIo: Extra I/O performance (when creating an instance)
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.snapshotId: Snapshot ID. Used when creating a disk from a snapshot. Disk size must not be smaller than the snapshot. (Create instance / create spot instance / query spot instance market price)
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.enableDeleteProtection: Disk deletion protection (when creating an instance)
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.deleteWithInstance: Whether the disk is deleted along with the instance. Effective only for pay-as-you-go billing. Default: false. Requires cdsAttributeActive=true when releasing the instance via V2 API.
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete auto snapshots when the disk is released (when creating an instance)
CreateInstanceBySpec.createCdsList.name: Disk name (when creating an instance)
CreateInstanceBySpec.imageId: Image ID for the instance to be created. Retrieve available image IDs via the image list API.
CreateInstanceBySpec.spec: Instance spec, e.g., bcc.g7.c2m8. Retrieve available specs via the instance spec list API.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bidModel: Spot instance bidding model. "market": market price; "custom": custom price. See BidModel.
CreateInstanceBySpec.bidPrice: Spot instance bid price in CNY/minute. If custom bidding is selected and the bid is below the market price, instance creation is not allowed. Effective only when bidModel='custom'.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskSizeInGb: System disk size in GB. Linux default: 20 GB, range [10, 2048]; Windows default: 40 GB, range [40, 2048]. Must meet the minimum disk size requirement of the selected image.
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskExtraIo: Extra I/O performance for the root disk
CreateInstanceBySpec.rootDiskStorageType: System disk storage type. Default: high-performance cloud disk (hp1). See StorageType for available options.
CreateInstanceBySpec.networkCapacityInMbps: Public network bandwidth in Mbps. For prepaid or bandwidth-billed postpaid EIPs: standard BGP range 1–500, enhanced BGP range 100–5000. For traffic-billed postpaid EIPs: standard BGP range 1–200 (peak bandwidth). 0 means no public IP is assigned. Default: 0 Mbps.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ehcClusterId: Optional parameter when creating a RoCE instance. If empty, the default EHC cluster is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.purchaseCount: Number of instances to create in batch. Must be a positive integer. Optional, default: 1.
CreateInstanceBySpec.purchaseMinCount: Minimum number of instances to create in batch
CreateInstanceBySpec.dedicatedHostId: Dedicated host ID. Specify to place the instance on a particular dedicated host.
CreateInstanceBySpec.relationTag: Whether to apply the same tags to associated resources (CDS data disks, EIPs, snapshots, snapshot chains). Default: false.
CreateInstanceBySpec.tags: List of tags to be created
CreateInstanceBySpec.fileSystems: List of CFS file systems to mount to the instance
CreateInstanceBySpec.fileSystems.protocol: Protocol type of the CFS file system. Valid values: nfs, smb.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks: DCC instances support multiple local disks with specified type and size. Other BCC types support at most one local disk using the default type; only size needs to be specified. FPGA and GPU instances use one local disk by default with size specified by configuration.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks.storageType: CDS disk storage type. Options: SSD_Enhanced (enhanced SSD), cloud_hp1 (general SSD), hp1 (high-performance cloud disk), hdd (general HDD). Default: hp1.
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks.sizeInGB: Disk size in GB (when creating an instance or spot instance)
CreateInstanceBySpec.ephemeralDisks.freeSizeInGB: Available capacity in GB (when creating an instance)
CreateInstanceBySpec.securityGroupId: Deprecated. Specifies a security group. If empty, the default security group is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.securityGroupIds: List of security group IDs. If empty, the default security group is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: List of enterprise security group IDs. When non-empty, securityGroupIds is ignored. If empty, the default security group is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.subnetId: Subnet ID. If empty, the default subnet is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.deployId: Deployment set ID for the instance
CreateInstanceBySpec.deployIdList: List of deployment set IDs for the instance
CreateInstanceBySpec.eniIds: List of elastic network interface (ENI) short IDs to attach. In batch creation, ENIs are distributed evenly across instances; ensure the total count is a multiple of the instance count and that each instance does not exceed its maximum ENI limit. Not supported for EBC bare-metal instances. Maximum 5000 ENI IDs.
CreateInstanceBySpec.disableRootDiskSerial: Whether to hide the system disk serial number (SN) at instance creation. Default: false. true: hide; false: do not hide.
CreateInstanceBySpec.zoneName: Availability zone name. Retrieve available zones via the zone list API. Naming format: "country-region-zone", lowercase, e.g., "cn-bj-a" for Beijing Zone A. For dedicated instances, the zone is determined by the dedicated host and does not need to be specified.
CreateInstanceBySpec.resGroupId: Resource group ID to bind to the instance
CreateInstanceBySpec.isEipAutoRelatedDelete: Whether the postpaid EIP bound to the instance is automatically released when the instance is released. true: yes, false: no. Default: false. Effective only when the public network billing method is bandwidth-based or traffic-based pay-as-you-go.
CreateInstanceBySpec.networkPurchaseType: EIP line type. Options: standard BGP (BGP) and enhanced BGP (BGP_S). Default: standard BGP.
CreateInstanceBySpec.instanceType: Instance type to create. See InstanceType for available options. If empty, the default instance type is used.
CreateInstanceBySpec.internetChargeType: Public network billing method. See internetChargeType for options. If not specified, defaults to the same billing method as BCC: prepaid defaults to bandwidth-based monthly/yearly billing; postpaid defaults to bandwidth-based pay-as-you-go.
CreateInstanceBySpec.eipName: Public IP name. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -_/. characters. Auto-generated if not provided.
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenHostEye: Whether to enable host security. true: enable, false: disable. Default: enabled if not specified.
CreateInstanceBySpec.enableHt: Whether to enable hyper-threading (HT) for EBC instances. Default: true. true: enable, false: disable.
CreateInstanceBySpec.billing.paymentTiming: Payment method. Options: Prepaid, Postpaid, bidding (spot instance). (Create instance / create spot instance / instance renewal)
CreateInstanceBySpec.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Required for prepaid; not needed for postpaid. (Create instance / create spot instance / instance renewal)
CreateInstanceBySpec.isOpenIpv6: Whether to enable IPv6 for the instance. Only supported when both the image and subnet support IPv6. true: enable, false: disable. If not specified, automatically adapts based on image and subnet IPv6 support.
